title: Rich & Velvety Ukrainian Beef Stir-fry
description: A rich and velvety beef dish marinated in soy sauce with no eggs for a date-night-friendly meal that showcases traditional Ukrainian flavors.
instructions: Blend 3 tablespoons of soy sauce with minced garlic, red pepper flakes, and cornstarch until smooth.
Add cubed beef to the marinade and coat evenly. Marinate for at least an hour.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Remove meat from the marinade and set aside.
Sear the beef cubes until browned on all sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Pour off excess fat from the wok, add more oil if necessary.
Add marinated sauce to the hot wok, stir-fry for a minute or two until slightly thickened.
Return the beef to the wok and toss with vegetables (optional: sliced onions, bell peppers), cooking until heated through.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped parsley.
